title: Phase 1: Cut the brain over to the pgvector document substrate (rip out graphiti/FalkorDB)

stories.title: Rip out graphiti/FalkorDB infra; stand up Postgres + pgvector
Strip graphiti-backed code down to a clean service shell
Create sources + chunks schema and indexes (migration)
Notion fetch by URL (title, text, path)
Ingest endpoint: POST a Notion URL, store the whole page as one chunk
Repoint the MCP face onto recall/profile/map
Validation gate: smoke on the real Target-role page
Update docs to the pgvector reality; leave PWA capture cleanly disabled
